title: Alb
compiled_truth: Alb is an external contact at [Cpuc](companies/cpuc). Over the corpus period (1999-11-22 to 2000-12-13), Alb sent 3 and received 90 emails, totalling 93 interactions. Top correspondents: [Alan Reid](people/alan-reid-pcp) (3), [Andy Bettwy](people/andy-bettwy-swgas) (3), [Aod](people/aod-newsdata) (3), [Askaff](people/askaff-energy-law-group) (3), [Bcragg](people/bcragg-gmssr) (3).
